channel.title: 飞翔的AI资讯站 · 每日精选
channel.description: 每日精选 AI 行业最值得关注的动态——模型更新、产品发布、设计趋势

item.title: From data to decisions: how LSEG is scaling trusted AI
item.description: See how LSEG uses OpenAI to scale trusted AI across its global business, accelerating insights, shrinking release cycles, and empowering 4,000 employees.

item.title: How engineers at Nextdoor use Codex to build without limits
item.description: How engineers at Nextdoor use Codex with GPT-5.5 to investigate hard-to-reproduce issues, build across platforms, and focus on product outcomes.

item.title: What Codex unlocks for Notion
item.description: How Notion uses Codex to one-shot specs, build AI Voice Input for the web, and multiply engineering power across small teams.

item.title: Industrial policy for the Intelligence Age
item.description: Explore our ambitious, people-first industrial policy ideas for the AI era—focused on expanding opportunity, sharing prosperity, and building resilient institutions as advanced intelligence evolves.

item.title: Confidential submission of draft S-1 to the SEC
item.description: OpenAI confirms a confidential S-1 submission to the SEC and has not yet determined timing for further action.

item.title: Generative AI to quantify uncertainty in weather forecasting
item.description: Posted by Lizao (Larry) Li, Software Engineer, and Rob Carver, Research Scientist, Google Research

item.title: AutoBNN: Probabilistic time series forecasting with compositional bayesian neural networks
item.description: Posted by Urs Köster, Software Engineer, Google Research

item.title: Computer-aided diagnosis for lung cancer screening
item.description: Posted by Atilla Kiraly, Software Engineer, and Rory Pilgrim, Product Manager, Google Research

item.title: Using AI to expand global access to reliable flood forecasts
item.description: Posted by Yossi Matias, VP Engineering & Research, and Grey Nearing, Research Scientist, Google Research

item.title: ScreenAI: A visual language model for UI and visually-situated language understanding
item.description: Posted by Srinivas Sunkara and Gilles Baechler, Software Engineers, Google Research

item.title: The “steroid olympics” were a circus—and a window into our culture
item.description: Testosterone. Methenolone. Nandrolone. Human growth hormone and EPO. Meldonium, modafinil, and mixed amphetamine salts. Clomiphene, anastrozole, levothyroxine, and liothyronine. Patches and capsules, creams and pills. A whole galaxy of steroids, metabolic modulators, and synthetic hormones coursing

item.title: The Download: whole-body rejuvenation drugs and five things to know about AI
item.description: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. David Sinclair plans to test whole-body rejuvenation drugs in the XPrize competition The outspoken longevity scientist David Sinclair has predicted th

item.title: Learning to lead in a hybrid human-AI enterprise
item.description: As adoption of AI agents looks set to surge by as much as 300% in the next two years, leadership teams are carefully considering the implications of a hybrid human-AI workforce. Unlike existing enterprise-level automation that relies on manual input, AI agents are capable of autonomously coordinati

item.title: David Sinclair plans to test whole-body rejuvenation drugs in the XPrize competition
item.description: The outspoken longevity scientist David Sinclair has been predicting that one day, you’ll go to the doctor and get a prescription that will make you 10 years younger. Now MIT Technology Review has learned that he has plans to launch human tests of an oral “reprogramming” drug as part of

item.title: Five things you need to know about AI
item.description: At SXSW London last week I gave a talk called “Five things you need to know about AI,” in which I shared what I think are the biggest themes in AI right now. I pulled a few things from our first AI10 list, an annual guide to the most important trends in this buzzy world,…

item.title: 抖音征召天下「AI视频英才」！创作者们，这次是真能吃上AI红利了…
item.description: 踮起脚尖吧。

item.title: 英特尔锐炫™ Pro B70 GPU亮相MPTS2026，共探大视听时代AI创作新范式
item.description: AI创作新时代，英特尔锐炫™ Pro B70 GPU 释放专业算力潜能

item.title: 百度智能云与FluxA达成战略合作，共建 Agent 经济全球支付基础设施
item.description: 诚邀30家OPC入驻内测

item.title: GPT-5.6首批实测来了！精准狙击Mythos
item.description: 本月发布！

item.title: Claude Fable 5首日实测，杀疯了…
item.description: 听取哇声一片
